steps.t: Angmarim scrolls and tomes can be found in the tower, Tûr Ágal, at Caivád Sâr. Múta has asked you to collect Angmarim scrolls and tomes from the force…
Múta can be found outside Caivád Sâr in northern Elderslade. You have collected many tomes and scrolls from the forces of the Iron Crown at Caivád Sâr…
